meta.title: Hong Kong SME KOL/KOC promotion — pay for performance
meta.description: Takeaways, restaurants, leisure — boost volume and rankings for new stores. Full support on OpenRice, Dianping, Keeta, and Xiaohongshu. No conversion, no fee — transparent data, pause anytime. Contact us now.
meta.merchantTitle: Koox | Grow your restaurant with Koox
meta.merchantDescription: Connect delivery and lifestyle platforms to help fine dining reach the right audience. Pay only on real conversions—turning every investment into foot traffic and quality reviews.
meta.deliveryDescription: Hands-on delivery platform operations for restaurants: menu and merchandising, campaigns, analytics, and growth—aligned with Keeta and foodpanda. Low-risk revenue share model.

hero.subtitle: Elevate your dining experience. Koox turns every meal into a rewarding journey with real-time cashback and AI-powered savings across your favorite delivery apps.

step1.title: Browse & choose
step1.body: Discover curated local favorites and trending hotspots through our editor-selected collections.

step2.title: Order on Keeta or foodpanda
step2.body: Check out on Keeta or foodpanda—we track your order and rewards.

step3.title: Submit & verify
step3.body: Upload your receipt or order proof. Once verified by our AI, your cashback is instantly credited to your Koox wallet.

step4.title: Earn cashback
step4.body: Watch your earnings grow instantly in your Koox wallet. Withdraw anytime to your bank.

features.aiBody: Stop overpaying. Our intelligent engine scans multiple delivery platforms to find you the lowest fees and highest rewards in seconds.
features.aiConciergeAlt2: Koox — optimizing your order across platforms
features.plannerBody: Maximize your earnings with personalized dining suggestions based on upcoming high-multiplier reward periods.
features.unifiedRewardsBody: Connect all your delivery apps. One wallet, universal cashback, and zero friction.
features.unifiedRewardsTagline: One ledger to rule them all.

merchantPage.heroHeadingLine1: Traditional influencer deals: pay upfront first,
merchantPage.heroHeadingLine2: results are uncertain and review quality is a gamble
merchantPage.heroIntroLead: Koox approach: zero upfront fee, commission only after each successful order.
merchantPage.heroIntroLeadExtra: With as little as HK$200, you can start marketing your store.
merchantPage.heroIntroBody: We are accountable for outcomes: not one-time passersby, but returning customers who leave quality reviews. Reach the right diners precisely while keeping campaign control in your hands.
merchantPage.heroSubtitle: Connect delivery and lifestyle platforms to help fine dining reach the right audience. Pay only on real conversions—so every dollar you invest becomes foot traffic and quality reviews.

dasanyuan.name: Da Sanyuan
dasanyuan.quote: Our calligraphy-led identity and traditional visual language now reach premium diners with stronger recall.

xiyuan.name: Xiyuan Xiaoguan
xiyuan.quote: Koox helps us match refined home-style dishes with the right audience, improving campaign conversion consistency.

jinbaiwan.name: Jin Baiwan Roast Duck
jinbaiwan.quote: Pay-for-performance plus clear analytics gives us better control over spending in both peak and off-peak periods.

shenwansan.name: Shen Wansan
shenwansan.quote: Our regional signature story now stands out better, and repeat visits have grown steadily.

friedrice.name: Chef-Career Fried Rice
friedrice.quote: We test campaign ideas around hero dishes, and Koox real-time metrics help us scale the right offers quickly.

shanxi.name: Shanxi Noodle House
shanxi.quote: After going live, store visibility improved clearly and dinner-hour organic orders kept climbing.

yexiangge.name: Yexiangge
yexiangge.quote: After launching our tropical-flavor campaign, both new customer conversion and social shares improved noticeably.

dahuchun.name: Da Hu Chun
dahuchun.quote: Combining our heritage brand with digital promotion brought steadier in-store traffic across lunch and dinner.

merchantPage.advantagesSub: Elevating the standards of merchant partnerships through transparency and autonomy.
merchantPage.benefit1Body: Each order is settled on its own—pay when it completes; full refund when it doesn’t.
merchantPage.benefit2Body: Authentic experiences with real photos help your brand build a trustworthy reputation.
merchantPage.benefit3Body: You decide campaign duration and marketing spend. Launch from as low as HK$200 to quickly build early-stage reviews and orders.
merchantPage.benefit4Body: Manage multi-channel marketing in one place and easily reach different target audiences. Backed by 3,500+ users and 200+ verified KOLs across platforms, we support your campaigns.
merchantPage.tutorialSub: Get started in three quick steps and track every campaign with ease.
merchantPage.tutorialStep1Body: Reach out to our team to confirm the marketing plan that best fits your store.
merchantPage.tutorialStep2Body: Log in to the app to monitor campaign progress, store exposure, and order performance in real time.
merchantPage.tutorialStep3Body: Review campaign outcomes and confirm completion with transparent performance-based settlement.
merchantPage.comparisonSub: Compare Koox with traditional options to see where you save more and grow with less risk.
merchantPage.comparisonPricingKoox: Pay by results only - no conversion, no charge
merchantPage.comparisonPricingKol: Fixed fees apply regardless of outcomes
merchantPage.comparisonPricingAds: Charged by clicks/impressions with harder cost control
merchantPage.comparisonFlexibilityKoox: Pause campaigns anytime with full merchant control
merchantPage.comparisonFlexibilityKol: Contract terms make mid-campaign changes difficult
merchantPage.comparisonFlexibilityAds: Adjustments are cumbersome and pausing can waste spend
merchantPage.comparisonDataKoox: Campaign data is transparent and available in real time
merchantPage.comparisonDataKol: Data depends on KOL reporting and can be inconsistent
merchantPage.comparisonDataAds: Complex metrics are harder to map to real conversions
merchantPage.comparisonThresholdKoox: No subscription fee, starts from HK$200
merchantPage.comparisonThresholdKol: Typical budgets run from thousands to tens of thousands
merchantPage.comparisonThresholdAds: Small budgets deliver slowly while spending burns quickly
merchantPage.comparisonRiskKol: Large upfront investment with concentrated risk
merchantPage.comparisonRiskAds: Algorithm shifts can make returns unstable
merchantPage.ctaBody: Contact our merchant partnership team today to schedule a demo and explore personalized growth plans.

deliveryOpsPage.heroSubtitle: Dedicated support to break through traffic bottlenecks and improve category ranking—building digital-era competitiveness for your brand.
deliveryOpsPage.heroImgAlt: Tablet showing delivery analytics beside a plated dish
deliveryOpsPage.challengesSub: Running takeout is not only great food—it is a game of data and strategy.
deliveryOpsPage.challenge1Body: Platform rules and tooling are complex—campaigns, traffic products, and store configuration are hard to get right.
deliveryOpsPage.challenge2Body: Competition is fierce and costs stack up—even with volume, profit can disappear.
deliveryOpsPage.challenge3Body: Great food without new orders, low repeat conversion, and weak brand presence on listings.
deliveryOpsPage.challenge4Body: Unclear how to improve store weighting, weak analytics, and ad spend that burns without direction.
deliveryOpsPage.servicesHeading: If you work with us, you get
deliveryOpsPage.servicesLead: End-to-end managed operations so you can focus on the kitchen—Koox handles the rest.
deliveryOpsPage.servicesWhy3: A tailored growth roadmap for your store
deliveryOpsPage.service1Body: Margin-aware menu structure and pricing to lift average ticket size.
deliveryOpsPage.service2Body: Daily performance readouts and fast iteration on what moves the needle.
deliveryOpsPage.service3Body: Seasonal and bespoke promos designed to unlock traffic spikes.
deliveryOpsPage.service4Body: Multi-dimensional health checks to find where traffic is leaking.
deliveryOpsPage.service5Body: Listing visuals and layout polish to lift click-through and conversion.
deliveryOpsPage.service6Body: Dynamic monitoring to keep acquisition costs under control.
deliveryOpsPage.service7Body: Complete baseline configuration and weighting signals for stable growth.
deliveryOpsPage.service8Body: Item descriptions that sell—clear, appetizing, conversion-focused.
deliveryOpsPage.service9Body: Review workflows to protect and improve store reputation.
deliveryOpsPage.casesSub: Representative performance snapshots from recent partnerships—from traffic lift to revenue breakthroughs.
deliveryOpsPage.pricingBody: We only win when you win. Commission kicks in after you earn—low barrier, shared risk, aligned incentives.

merchant.body: Put your restaurant in front of thousands of hungry users. Reach new customers, increase order volume, and maximize your ROI with our high-conversion rewards platform.
